content: Tiny Tina's Assault on Dragon Keep
name: Lightning Bolt
description: A Maliwan spell grenade that fires a straight lightning bolt, detonating on contact with a surface or enemy and chaining shock damage into nearby targets. Like the other spell grenades, it passively regenerates grenade ammo over time.
notes:
Chain Lightning is the upgraded counterpart. Its name nods to the Lightning Bolt spell from Dungeons & Dragons, while the red text references Back to the Future and the "1.21 gigawatts" line. It may also allude to a well-known early-2000s LARP clip.

While this grenade is equipped, Axton can occasionally shout "Lightning Bolt!", including when deploying his Sabre Turret.

special.description: Fires a lightning strike from your hand and slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
special.title: What's a jigawatt?

abilities: Slowly regenerates grenade ammo over time.
